title: Link management BIFs — link, unlink, process_flag
purpose: Link and trap_exit data structures exist but are not callable from bytecode. This brief adds link/1, unlink/1, and process_flag/2 as BIFs.
task: Add three BIFs to process_bifs.rs. Extend ProcessContext with process table and link state access. Register in register_gate2_bifs().
boundaries: This brief SHALL NOT implement priority inheritance or priority changes via process_flag
This brief SHALL NOT implement process groups (erlang:group_leader/2)
This brief SHALL NOT implement erlang:process_info/1 or erlang:process_info/2

requirements.title: erlang:link/1
requirements.spec: erlang:link/1 SHALL establish a bidirectional link. Nonexistent target sends noproc. Already-linked or self-link is a no-op.
acceptance: link(Pid) adds to both link sets
link to nonexistent sends noproc exit signal

requirements.title: erlang:unlink/1
requirements.spec: erlang:unlink/1 SHALL remove the bidirectional link. No-op if no link exists.
acceptance: unlink of nonexistent is no-op returning true
After unlink, target exit does not affect caller

requirements.title: erlang:process_flag/2
requirements.spec: erlang:process_flag/2 SHALL accept (trap_exit, Bool), set flag, return previous value. kill bypasses trap_exit.
acceptance: process_flag(trap_exit, true) enables trapping, returns previous value
With trap_exit, linked death delivers {EXIT, Pid, Reason}
